title: Sourcing Map Navy Blue Checkered Ribbon, 2.5 Inch x 10 Yards Wired Edge Gingham Ribbon for Gift Wrapping, DIY, Christmas Decoration and Bows Craft
features: Plaid wired ribbon is a ribbon with a plaid design and wired decoration. This kind of ribbon is usually used in packaging, hand-made, decoration and other occasions. It can not only add beauty to the items, but also serve as decoration and embellishment. Plaid wired ribbon is widely used in gift packaging, holiday decoration, DIY hand-made and other aspects.
Plaid Check Wired Edge Ribbon;Type: Lattice heat transfer single-sided ribbon;Color: Navy Blue;Material: Linen;Size: 2.5 Inch x 10 Yards ( W*L);Package Content: 1 Pcs Plaid Ribbon

Material and Craftsmanship: Our ribbon type is a plaid thermal transfer single-sided ribbon, which is made of fine linen and has the characteristics of bright color, no fading, soft touch, rich patterns, and novel fashion.

Application: Our wrapping ribbons and decorative ribbons are widely used in gift packaging, handmade, holiday decoration, clothing decoration and wedding arrangement, such as Christmas, Thanksgiving decoration, gift decoration, etc. It can not only increase the beauty of items, but also add fashionable decorative elements to your items, create a unique visual effect and atmosphere, and is a versatile decorative material.

Prepare the items to be decorated, cut the patterned ribbon to the appropriate length with scissors, and then decorate the items according to your needs.Note: Since the ribbon is produced by machine, there may be joints inside a roll of ribbon. Please allow slight errors in size due to manual measurement.
